title: Mandalorian cave
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Deadbucketheads.jpg|thumb|250px|The cave.]]

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], '''this passage''' was a part of a [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] hive on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaadja/Legends|Zaadja]] that had the corpses of dead [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].

==Behind the scenes==
Years after the events depicted in this comic, [[Jodo Kast]] salvaged Mandalorian armor from this planet. It is likely he obtained it from this cave.<ref name="HM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 67|''Republic'' 67]]
